zh.Pilkington Manor, Oldham, Lancashire, En: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾皮爾金頓
zh.Pilkington Manor Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾皮爾金頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger de Pilkington Snr於大約1255年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾皮爾金頓時，他的父親Sir Alexander de Pilkington II31歲，母親Alice de Chetham26歲。他於大約1290年與Amery de Barton結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於從1322年7月11日到1323年5月在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Roger de Pilkington Snr于大约1255年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾皮爾金頓时，他的父亲Sir Alexander de Pilkington II31岁，母亲Alice de Chetham26岁。他于大约1290年与Amery de Barton结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于从1322年7月11日到1323年5月在英国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pilkington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northwestern): habitational name from a place in Lancashire. The placename may derive from an Old English personal name Pīleca or Pīloc + patronymic -ing + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The surname is established in Ireland, where its presence was first recorded in the early 15th century.

nameMeanings.name: Snr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written ស, from a Khmer word meaning e.g. ‘white, fair’. Compare   Sar   1.
Cambodian: written សរ, from a Khmer word meaning ‘arrow’. Compare   Sar   2.

variants.name: Sar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Hak, Pang, Ry, Thay, Leang, Hai, Him, Chan, Heang, Sarin.  Cambodian Chamroeun, Savoeun, Sokhom, Vuthy.
Cambodian: written ស, from a Khmer word meaning e.g. ‘white, fair’. Compare   Sor   1.
Cambodian: written សរ, from a Khmer word meaning ‘arrow’. Compare   Sor   2.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger de Pilkington Snr was born about 1255, in Pilkington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Alexander de Pilkington II, was 31 and his mother, Alice de Chetham, was 26. He married Amery de Barton about 1290. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died from 11 July 1322 to May 1323, in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger de Pilkington Snr est né environ 1255, à Pilkington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Alexander de Pilkington II, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alice de Chetham, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Amery de Barton environ 1290. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé du 11 juillet 1322 au mai 1323, à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roger de Pilkington Snr um 1255 in Pilkington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alexander de Pilkington II 31 und seine Mutter Alice de Chetham 26. Er hat um 1290 Amery de Barton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb von 11. Juli 1322 bis Mai 1323 in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger de Pilkington Snr è nato il circa 1255 nel Pilkington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Alexander de Pilkington II, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Chetham, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Amery de Barton circa 1290. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì da 11 luglio 1322 a maggio 1323, nel England.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger de Pilkington Snr(이)가 대략 1255년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 피킨그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alexander de Pilkington II(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Chetham(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1290년 Amery de Barton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1322년 7월 11일부터 1323년 5월 까지 영국에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger de Pilkington Snr nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Pilkington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Alexander de Pilkington II, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Chetham, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Amery de Barton aproximadamente 1290. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu de 11 de julho de 1322 a maio de 1323, em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roger de Pilkington Snr родился около 1255 г. в местности пилкингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Alexander de Pilkington II было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice de Chetham, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Amery de Barton около 1290 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер с 11 июля 1322 по май 1323 в местности Англия.
